author: Sablinova
install_msg:
Thank you for installing SabHoneypot!
Run `[p]sabhoneypot setup` for guided configuration, or use individual commands.
If migrating from AAA3A's Honeypot, use `[p]sabhoneypot migrate`.
name: SabHoneypot
short: Trap channel to catch self-bots and scammers.
description: Creates a decoy channel at the top of your server to automatically detect and act on self-bots and scammers. Supports mute, kick (softban), ban, or log-only actions with full modlog integration. Includes migration from AAA3A's Honeypot cog.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store end user data. Detected messages are logged to a configured channel and Red's modlog.
